blocks.text: Match preview: India face Afghanistan in 2nd ODI (ODI) on Wed, 17 Jun, 2026, 1:30 pm at Bharat Ratna Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Ekana Cricket Stadium Lucknow. Full pitch report, weather forecast, and squad details below.

rows: Bharat Ratna Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Ekana Cricket Stadium Lucknow

blocks.text: Standard ODI surface expected. Conditions will be clearer at the toss — monitor team selection and dew factor for night games.
Expected par score: 250–290 runs par score.
Overcast · High 38°C / Low 30°C · Rain: 0 mm · Wind: up to 11 km/h. Cloud cover expected — seamers may get movement with the new ball.
International playing XI is announced at the toss. Check back on match day for confirmed line-ups.
